reviews.text: My husband and I had the most beautiful October 2025 wedding at Gorrono Ranch/San Sophia Overlook in Telluride. I remember first inquiring about the venue right after getting engaged, and the team was so excited, helpful, and informative. We worked mostly with Sarah, and she was such a joy to work with. She helped us identify the right venue for our vision, was mindful of our budget, and worked with our wedding planner to perfectly execute every detail of our day. We also had the best time with Alex at our food/wine tasting and he helped us curate beverages and the perfect menu to serve our guests. The views and service at our venue were nothing short of magical, and my husband and I couldn't imagine getting married anywhere else. Thank you a million times to the Telluride Weddings team!!! Wish we could give you all 10 stars!

Getting married at San Sophia Overlook was a dream come true, and it was made even more special thanks to Jessica and her incredible team. From the very beginning, Jessica was a joy to work with—friendly, professional and always highly responsive to our emails and questions in the months leading up to our wedding.

Jessica went above and beyond to accommodate our custom requests, including creating a personalized ski sign. Her and her team provided multiple mock-ups until it was exactly what we envisioned, and the final result was perfect!

On the day of the wedding, Jessica and her service team at our satellite bar was amazing—attentive, efficient and truly added to the overall experience for our guests. Every detail was thoughtfully executed, and we felt completely taken care of.

We’re so grateful for everything the Telluride Wedding Team did to bring our vision to life. If you’re planning at event at San Sophia or anywhere nearby, we can’t recommend their incredible team enough!

Recently I got married at Palmyra Lookout and it was absolutely perfect from start to finish! The views are beyond breathtaking, but what really made the experience incredible was working with the Telluride Weddings team! Piper and Jessica were my main points of contact and from the start, they made the planning process so easy—every question I had was answered quickly, and I always felt supported.

The Telski wedding team was fantastic to work with!  We primarily worked with Tiffany, who is a gem, but each person we met with as part of the larger wedding planning process was extremely considerate, kind, professional, and responsive!  This past Summer, we had a very fun wedding tasting up at Gorrono Rach to talk through all the possibilities and the team made the process such a fun & unique experience.  Then the Telski team worked so hard to help us pull off our logistically complicated wedding (aka a winter wedding at Gorrono Ranch, which required snowcats, limited window to set-up, a staging area for guests to hang out, etc.).  Also extremely appreciated was their attention to details when setting up Gorrono Ranch as a wedding venue, cute ideas (like having a custom ski sign made for us), and most amazingly, their estimate for budget as almost exactly what it ended up costing, so they're not hiding any fees or charges for post-wedding. All in all, highly recommend and many thanks again to the great Telski wedding team!

Our wedding at the Peaks and San Sophia in Telluride was the most incredible day of my life! Piper particularly was so amazing with helping to plan and making our big day the most special day for us. I would highly recommend getting married in Telluride. I think it’s one of the most beautiful places in CO, absolutely nothing beats the view at San Sophia and the vibe of the town. It’s like getting married on top of the world!
